# TaskManager

A simple task management app with add, delete, and mark complete features.

## Generated by Code Vibe

This project was automatically generated by Code Vibe AI Website Builder.

### Features
- Add new tasks
- Delete tasks
- Mark tasks as complete
- View all tasks

### Tech Stack
- frontend: {'framework': 'React', 'styling': 'Tailwind CSS', 'language': 'JavaScript/JSX', 'other': ['Axios']}
- backend: {'framework': 'Express.js', 'language': 'Node.js / JavaScript', 'other': ['cors', 'body-parser']}
- database: SQLite
